documentation.description:
=== HTML Renderer ===
The `Html_Renderer` allows to render a wiki document into an HTML content.

tagged_types.name: Html_Renderer
tagged_types.code: type Html_Renderer is limited new Renderer with private;

subprograms.name: Add_Blockquote
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Blockquote (Engine : in out Html_Renderer;
                          Level    : in Natural)

subprograms.name: Add_Text
Finish
subprograms.code:
procedure Finish (Engine : in out Html_Renderer;
                  Doc    : in Wiki.Documents.Document)

subprograms.name: Get_Section_Number
Render
Render_Definition
Render_List_End
subprograms.code:
procedure Render_List_End (Engine : in out Html_Renderer;
                           Tag    : in String)

subprograms.name: Render_List_Item
Render_List_Start
Render_Preformatted
Render_Table

procedure Set_Format (Engine : in out Html_Renderer;
                      Format : in Wiki.Format_Map)

subprograms.name: Set_Link_Renderer
subprograms.code:

                             Links  : in Wiki.Render.Links.Link_Renderer_Access)
